title: muilla maritima
intro: Muilla maritima, also known as sea onion or salt and pepper plant, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant and its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Muilla maritima include its potential to help treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Muilla maritima can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
